2024-25 Louisiana Ragin' Cajuns Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 12-21 (8-10, 8th in Sun Belt MBB)

Coach: Bob Marlin (3-9), Derrick Zimmerman (9-12)

PS/G: 65.4 (351st of 364)

PA/G: 73.0 (210th of 364)

SRS: -10.70 (301st of 364)

SOS: -2.33 (176th of 364)

ORtg: 97.4 (349th of 364)

DRtg: 108.7 (288th of 364)
